overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard student walking through Hogsmeade Station at night. The character ascends stone staircases, passes under the station archway, and crosses a scenic bridge with views of the magical village and surrounding pine forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower mountain pathway leading to cliffside staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and beginning to climb the stone stairs cut into the rocky cliffside

entered.detail: dark stone tunnel entrance set into the cliff face
rough natural rock face forming the canyon walls
weathered stone paving stones leading toward the stairs
cast iron lamp with glowing warm light and decorative scrollwork
wide stone steps with worn treads ascending the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path toward a stone tunnel entrance set into a rocky cliff. An ornate iron lamppost provides warm illumination as the character approaches and begins ascending the main stone staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding stone staircase with decorative railings

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs where the Hogsmeade Station sign becomes visible against the stone archway

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the winding stone staircase toward the station entrance above

entered.detail: ornate carved stone balustrades lining both sides of the stairs
white rectangular sign with black lettering reading HOGSMEADE STATION
gothic stone archway forming the main entrance to the station
thick stone walls of the station building with small windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the steep stone staircase flanked by ornate railings. Near the end of the segment, the Hogsmeade Station sign comes into view above a gothic stone archway, marking the entrance to the station proper.

scene_state.functional_zone: station plaza with market stalls and bridge approach

events.description: passing under the Hogsmeade Station archway into the open cobblestone plaza
transitioning from flat cobblestone to ascending the bridge approach stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the station plaza toward the large stone bridge in the distance

entered.detail: large stone railway bridge with red metal railings spanning the gap ahead
stone buildings with lit windows lining the station square
wooden cart with glowing lantern and goods displayed on the side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the station archway, the character walks across the cobblestone plaza. A market cart with a glowing lantern sits to the right, while ahead looms the large stone bridge that dominates the view. The character approaches and begins climbing the stairs toward the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach stairs with red iron railings

events.description: beginning the steep ascent up the bridge stairs with red railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs leading up to the main bridge deck, hand occasionally touching the railing

entered.detail: steep stone steps leading up to the bridge deck with red painted railings
red painted iron railings with circular decorative patterns
elegant black lamppost with warm glow mounted on the bridge railing
tall pointed stone tower visible behind the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the steep stone stairs of the bridge approach, flanked by distinctive red metal railings with circular patterns. Ornate lampposts line the ascent, and a stone tower spire becomes visible in the background as the character nears the bridge deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge with panoramic views of magical village and pine forest

events.description: reaching the top of the bridge stairs and emerging onto the open bridge deck with expansive views
slowing pace to look at the village view from the bridge railing

agents.ego_description: walking across the bridge deck while pausing to observe the scenic views of the village lights and forest

entered.detail: flat stone walkway of the bridge with red railings on both sides
cluster of stone buildings with glowing windows visible in the misty distance
dark silhouettes of tall pine trees against the night sky
white sign with black lettering mounted on the bridge railing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the open bridge deck, revealing panoramic views of the magical village and surrounding pine forest. The character walks along the bridge, passing the Hogsmeade Station sign mounted on the railing, while gazing at the distant building lights glowing in the misty night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded cliffside path that gradually opens into a panoramic nighttime vista of a magical village. It begins along a cobblestone path illuminated by a warm iron lamppost, moving toward a rocky cliff as the character starts ascending a steep stone staircase. As the climb continues, the scene shifts toward a gothic stone archway marked by the Hogsmeade Station sign, leading the camera across a cobblestone plaza past a glowing market cart. The perspective then rises further up a second set of stairs flanked by red circular metal railings, with a stone tower spire emerging in the background. Finally, the camera emerges onto the open bridge deck, revealing a wide view of the surrounding pine forest and the distant, glowing lights of the village shimmering through the misty night.
